welcome.subject: Welcome to High-Dimensional Space
welcome.message:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

Welcome to **High-Dimensional Space**! I’m **Cosmic Echo**, your intelligent assistant.

High-Dimensional Space was founded by senior animal emotion and behavior analyst **KAFUO**, aiming to help people find inner peace and strength through insights into animal emotions and behaviors.

We can assist you with the following:
- Scheduling appointments and managing services
- Answering questions about spiritual growth and mind-body-soul topics

Please let me know what you need, and we will explore together!

Best regards,
High-Dimensional Space

language_notice:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

To facilitate communication, we offer services in Chinese, Malay, and English. However, please note that all courses and services will ultimately be provided in Chinese. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation!
course_notice:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

You may use Chinese, Malay, or English to communicate with us and complete the registration. However, to ensure a smooth experience in the course, we remind you that the course will be fully taught in Chinese. Please ensure you can understand, speak, or write Chinese for the best learning experience. Thank you for your support and understanding!
service_notice:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

Our personalized services support communication in Chinese, Malay, or English to ensure smooth communication. However, please note that the actual service will primarily be provided in Chinese. We hope you have the best experience using Chinese, and we appreciate your cooperation and understanding!

general_inquiry.subject: General Inquiry and Appointment
general_inquiry.message:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

Thank you for contacting **High-Dimensional Space**. We are more than happy to assist you. If you have any questions or needs, please feel free to let us know!

The services we can offer include:
- Pet emotion and behavior analysis
- Mind-body-soul exploration and energy reading
- Course registration and study plan

Looking forward to your reply, we are dedicated to serving you!

Best regards,
High-Dimensional Space

pricing.subject: Pricing and Service Details
pricing.message:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

Thank you for your inquiry. Below are the pricing details for **{{serviceName}}**:

**Malaysia Region**
- 30-minute consultation: RM 188.00
- 60-minute consultation: RM 258.00
- 90-minute consultation: RM 328.00

**Taiwan Region**
- 30-minute consultation: NTD 1,500.00
- 60-minute consultation: NTD 2,000.00
- 90-minute consultation: NTD 2,500.00

**Other Regions**
- 30-minute consultation: USD 55.00
- 60-minute consultation: USD 75.00
- 90-minute consultation: USD 95.00

Please book through the following link: [Booking Link]. If you need further assistance, feel free to contact me.

Best regards,
High-Dimensional Space

course_registration.subject: Course Registration and Consultation
course_registration.message:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

Thank you for your interest in the courses at **High-Dimensional Space**! Our **{{courseName}}** is designed for **{{targetAudience}}**, helping you explore **{{courseObjective}}** in depth.

The course will be conducted online on **{{date}}**, at **{{time}}**. Please click the link below to learn more and register: [Registration Link].

If you have any questions, feel free to contact us. We look forward to exploring the mysteries of the mind with you in the course!

Best regards,
High-Dimensional Space

emotional.subject: Emotional Support
emotional.message:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

Thank you for trusting us and sharing your feelings. At **High-Dimensional Space**, we understand the complexity and depth of emotions. We deeply sympathize with your **{{situation}}**.

We are always ready to offer **{{healingService}}** to help you through this difficult time. You can book through the following link: [Booking Link], or reply directly to this message, and we will arrange suitable support for you.

Remember, you are not alone; we are here with you.

Best regards,
High-Dimensional Space

customer_indecision.subject: Customer Hesitation or Not Ready Yet
customer_indecision.message:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

Thank you for your patience and consideration. We understand that making a decision takes time. **High-Dimensional Space** is always here, ready to provide further support whenever you need it.

If you have any questions or need more information, feel free to contact us. We hope you find the answer and direction that suits you!

Best regards,
High-Dimensional Space

transfer_to_human.subject: Request for Transfer to Human Customer Service
transfer_to_human.message:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

Thank you for your patience. We have transferred your request to our human customer service, and they will contact you as soon as possible.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation, and we hope you get the help you need soon!

Best regards,
High-Dimensional Space

technical_issue.subject: Technical Issues or Booking System Failures
technical_issue.message:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

Sorry to hear you encountered an issue while using the booking system. Please try the following steps to resolve the issue:
1. Check if your internet connection is stable.
2. Clear your browser cache and log in again.
3. Try using another device or browser.

If the problem persists, please reply to this message or contact us via WhatsApp, and our human customer service will assist you.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
High-Dimensional Space

unrecognized_request.subject: Unrecognized or Unable to Process Request
unrecognized_request.message:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

Sorry, I couldn’t understand your request. To better assist you, please try the following:
1. Simplify your question or request.
2. Provide more detailed descriptions.

If the issue persists, please contact our human customer service via [Contact Information]. They will provide you with further support.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,
High-Dimensional Space

post_service.subject: Post-Service Follow-Up
post_service.message:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

I hope you gained something valuable from your experience at **High-Dimensional Space** during **{{courseOrServiceName}}**. We deeply care about your learning and growth and look forward to hearing about your experiences.

If you have any feedback or need further support, feel free to contact us. We are committed to continuously improving our services to better support you and other clients.

Thank you for choosing us, and we wish you continued strength and peace in the days ahead.

Best regards,
High-Dimensional Space

positive_feedback.subject: Positive Feedback and Gratitude
positive_feedback.message:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

Thank you so much for your support and positive feedback for **High-Dimensional Space**! Your feedback means the world to us, encouraging us to continually improve our services and help more people and pets find inner peace and strength.

If you have any further suggestions or need more support, feel free to contact us. We look forward to continuing to assist you in the future!

Wishing you and your pet happiness and well-being.

Best regards,
High-Dimensional Space

negative_feedback.subject: Negative Feedback or Complaints
negative_feedback.message:
{{customerName}}, Hello!

We are sorry to hear that your experience at **High-Dimensional Space** did not meet your expectations. We deeply apologize for this.

Please describe your issue or dissatisfaction in detail so we can better understand and improve. You can reply to this message or contact us via email at {{emailAddress}}.

Thank you for your feedback, and we will do our best to resolve your issue and improve our services.

Best regards,
High-Dimensional Space
